integrity.note: Every judge-visible indexed artifact was hash-verified; provenance-map.json was deliberately excluded and not opened.

requirements.finding: Live readouts use tabular numeric styling in source and the browser typography contract passes.
Digit cycling across both engines reports zero readout-width delta.
The signed formatter emits U+2212 and the browser scan reports hyphen-free readouts.
The canonical font definitions are centralized in the token stylesheet; lesson CSS references only --font-ui, --font-display and --font-mono and contains no ad-hoc family literal.
citations: sa-p3.css (font-face declarations and canonical font-token block)

requirements.finding: Both engines pass the input-to-paint budget over 220 synthetic drag events with zero runtime errors.
The browser contract confines phosphor ghosts to the canvas and excludes numeric text.
Browser and visual-regression settling evidence enforces one reduced-motion ghost or two normal-motion ghosts with falling opacity.
Normal navigation provides the aperture signature and reduced motion provides an equivalent direct/fade state without stale truth.
Computed lesson-surface audit reports no gradient, glow, shadow or filter violations.
The browser state sweep reports one annotation in the active trace state.
The trace test keeps the violet annotation separate from its engine-truth value twin, preserving token semantics.
All scaled layout cases pass; the eight judge-visible 130-percent screenshots show no clipping, overlap or horizontal scroll.
All indexed axe scans pass with no critical or serious violations.
Sliders expose unit-bearing plain-language values and announcements debounce to settle.
The surface manifest includes explicit Mission, Lab, Mastery and Result selectors in the academy-lesson contract.
The current post-hardening visual-regression gate passes all indexed cases. Baselines were not re-approved, alpha-only changes are detected, and all current images are opaque and nonblank.
The full indexed WebKit suite passes viewport, target, keyboard and failure-path coverage.

visualReview.clipping: None; masthead, four destination cards and both footer labels remain inside the viewport.
visualReview.hierarchy: The headline leads, Range is the clear primary action, and the flight path orders the secondary destinations.
visualReview.legibility: Strong contrast and readable card labels over the dark range image.
visualReview.honestDemoLabelling: PASS; Outcome and the footer explicitly say demo shot, and saved-state source switches to Latest saved session.
visualReview.reducedMotion: Complete for Home; the reduced capture is byte-identical to the settled normal frame while source disables trace, ball, scene and card motion.

visualReview.clipping: None; compact mode intentionally removes the intro paragraph and preserves all actions.
visualReview.hierarchy: Headline and primary Range card remain dominant despite the shorter height.
visualReview.legibility: Labels and values remain readable without wrapping into neighboring cards.
visualReview.honestDemoLabelling: PASS; demo state remains visible in Outcome and the footer.
visualReview.reducedMotion: Complete; the settled reduced and normal images are byte-identical.

visualReview.clipping: None; copy, cards, help target and footer all retain edge clearance.
visualReview.hierarchy: The left-aligned mission statement anchors the composition and the arc reads cleanly from Range through Academy.
visualReview.legibility: All four destinations remain distinct against the photographic field.
visualReview.targetOverlap: None; machine geometry also reports disjoint rectangles across both engines and motion modes.
visualReview.honestDemoLabelling: PASS; both Outcome and the footer disclose the demo state.
visualReview.reducedMotion: Complete; the settled reduced and normal images are byte-identical.

visualReview.hierarchy: The shortened layout still preserves the primary Range action and ordered downstream cards.
visualReview.legibility: Compact labels remain crisp and do not collide with the trajectory.
visualReview.targetOverlap: None; the closest Help-to-Academy edge separation is 8 px and all indexed target intersections are zero.
visualReview.reducedMotion: Complete; the settled reduced and normal images are byte-identical.

reducedMotionCompleteness.homeStaticEquivalence: All four normal/reduced Home capture pairs have identical hashes.
reducedMotionCompleteness.sourceCoverage: Home reduced-motion CSS disables view transition navigation, trace and ball animation, scene/card transitions, and boot opacity delay.
reducedMotionCompleteness.crossSurfaceEvidence: The indexed browser test and four navigation screenshots show normal aperture behavior and reduced-motion equivalent truth.

historicalGateContext.currentVisreg: Post-hardening visual regression passes all tests without baseline approval.
historicalGateContext.historicalAttempts: Two pre-hardening runs narrowly exceeded the global Academy Lab threshold; they are retained as history, are not Home failures, and are superseded by the hardened current gate.

noncriticalFindings.finding: Landscape-compact Help and Academy targets clear by exactly 8 px; this passes the indexed contract but is the tightest spacing in the Home layout.
